title: Temple of the Lovers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Temple of the Lovers''' was a temple on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after its [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. Built for the disciples of the [[Undying Flame]], the Temple was built for [[Yun-Txiin]] and [[Yun-Q'aah]], the [[Lover Gods]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], the temple was set on fire by war biots acting under the control of the [[World Brain]], who had been tasked by [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] to render Coruscant uninhabitable.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
